description: <<PREFIX>> Alert Noise Reduction: volume, noise sources, and SOC-actionable signal. Rendered from template; values discovered live.

graphs.title: Alert Noise Reduction: Overview
graphs.markdown:
Parameterized template. All product/source/action values are placeholders the solution fills from live discovery; nothing is hardcoded. Scope: all SentinelOne Security Alerts (default `class_uid=99602001`) for the dashboard window.

Severity (OCSF `severity_id`): 1 Informational, 2 Low, 3 Medium, 4 High, 5 Critical.

graphs.title: Daily alert volume: all products
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> | group Alerts=count() by timestamp=timebucket('1 day') | sort timestamp

graphs.title: Alerts by product
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> | group count=count() by metadata.product.name | sort -count | limit 10

graphs.title: Alerts by severity
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> severity_id=* | group count=count() by severity_id | sort -count

graphs.title: Noise Analysis
graphs.markdown: Top (source, signature) pairs and the source's own action per signature. Already-actioned rows (block/drop/sinkhole/reset) carry no residual risk. `<<NOISY_SOURCE>>` and `<<ACTION_FIELD>>` are filled from discovery.

graphs.title: Top 25 noisiest alert detections
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> finding_info.title=* | group Alerts=count() by Detection=finding_info.title, Product=metadata.product.name, Category=finding_info.analytic.category | sort -Alerts | limit 25

graphs.title: Alerts by threat category
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> finding_info.analytic.category=* | group count=count() by Category=finding_info.analytic.category | sort -count | limit 20

graphs.title: Alerts by product and severity
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> | group count=count() by Product=metadata.product.name, severity_id | transpose severity_id on Product

graphs.title: Noisy source drill-down: signature x action x severity
graphs.query: dataSource.name='<<NOISY_SOURCE>>' finding_info.title=* | group Alerts=count() by Signature=finding_info.title, Action=<<ACTION_FIELD>>, Severity=severity_id | sort -Alerts | limit 25

graphs.title: Signal (Real Detections)
graphs.markdown: Noisy source removed. Triage effort belongs here: endpoint, automation/platform rules, identity, email. A panel reading 0 is a good posture, not a broken panel.

graphs.title: Daily non-noisy alert volume
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> metadata.product.name!='<<NOISY_PRODUCT>>' | group Alerts=count() by timestamp=timebucket('1 day') | sort timestamp

graphs.title: Non-noisy alerts by product
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> metadata.product.name!='<<NOISY_PRODUCT>>' | group count=count() by metadata.product.name | sort -count | limit 10

graphs.title: Top non-noisy detections
graphs.query: <<ALERT_FILTER>> metadata.product.name!='<<NOISY_PRODUCT>>' finding_info.title=* | group Alerts=count() by Detection=finding_info.title, Product=metadata.product.name, Category=finding_info.analytic.category | sort -Alerts | limit 25
